field.title: CRC
field.formula:
IF sum([contact_in]) > 0 AND COUNTD([crm_id]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([contact_in]) / COUNTD([crm_id])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([contact_in_y33d]) > 0 AND COUNTD([crm_id_3ffn]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([contact_in_y33d]) / COUNTD([crm_id_3ffn])
END

field.title: CTR
field.formula:
IF SUM(MAX([impressions] FIXED [date], [campaign_name], [adgroup_name], [ad_id])) > 0 THEN
    SUM(MAX([clicks] FIXED [date], [campaign_name], [adgroup_name], [ad_id])) / SUM(MAX([impressions] FIXED [date], [campaign_name], [adgroup_name], [ad_id]))
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM(MAX([impressions_lcip] FIXED [date_b6up], [campaign_name_0msd], [adgroup_name_w3x7], [ad_id_wc06])) > 0 THEN
    SUM(MAX([clicks_2lxb] FIXED [date_b6up], [campaign_name_0msd], [adgroup_name_w3x7], [ad_id_wc06])) / SUM(MAX([impressions_lcip] FIXED [date_b6up], [campaign_name_0msd], [adgroup_name_w3x7], [ad_id_wc06]))
END

field.title: CRL
field.formula:
IF SUM(MAX([clicks] FIXED [date], [campaign_name], [adgroup_name], [ad_id])) > 0 AND COUNTD([crm_id]) > 0 THEN
    COUNTD([crm_id]) / SUM(MAX([clicks] FIXED [date], [campaign_name], [adgroup_name], [ad_id]))
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM(MAX([clicks_2lxb] FIXED [date_b6up], [campaign_name_0msd], [adgroup_name_w3x7], [ad_id_wc06])) > 0 AND COUNTD([crm_id_3ffn]) > 0 THEN
    COUNTD([crm_id_3ffn]) / SUM(MAX([clicks_2lxb] FIXED [date_b6up], [campaign_name_0msd], [adgroup_name_w3x7], [ad_id_wc06]))
END
